workboards.next: Review by store/category/field; copy exact values into catalog_field_confirmed_rows.json.
Find exact source URLs for no-source rows first; then attach images only from exact product pages.
Confirm exact source URLs in the focus template first; imports stay dry-run until manual confirmation is present.
Review image-derived detail URLs that were rejected by title/HTTP checks; import only exact product pages.
Resolve exact product/detail source_url first; image import remains blocked while source_url is blank, generic, stale, or identity-uncertain.
Run web image search in small store/index batches; only import candidates that survive consolidation safety guards.
Use exact title + maker matches only; keep contained/generic title matches out of automatic imports.
Review weak/ambiguous prize-line candidates before changing source_store or importing image URLs.
Compare current DB line/title with the official fallback title before importing any image URL; broad character hits can be a different prize line.
Use this queue after agent/manual research; import only ready items and leave rejected source/store/title conflicts in review.
Re-scan historical image candidate files against the current seed; import only ready items that still pass identity and safety checks.
Resolve ambiguous storefront/Fanding product rows before importing exact source/image/release fields.
Review Fanding candidates manually; current fuzzy matches are not safe for automatic image/source import.
Review Pokemon Center homepage rows; import only exact product pages because common terms produce multiple plausible products.
Confirm title/detail identity before writing official source/image fields.
Confirm broad Animate representative rows first; Ensky has no safe official detail imports in the completed sweep.
Use official Taito brand API results as evidence; import only single exact character/title matches.
Use this audit before searching gotouchi rows; most stale themes need external official evidence rather than JP-API auto-fill.
Review server/ichiban_replacement_url_queue.md first; import only official candidates that extract prize rows and match the missing campaign.
Keep archive/404/no-lineup campaigns documented; only add rows or metadata when exact official prize-lineup evidence is found.
Keep documented terminal campaign gaps archived; import metadata only when labeled official release or yen-price evidence is safe.
Keep taxonomy normalized; review missing images/source by category.
Keep folder colors grouped by palette sections and ensure animation category visual hints exist in the app icon/color catalogs.
Import only confirmed rows; completed duplicates are kept in archive files.
Review stale source cleanup rows before propagating images; old product IDs can point to unrelated current products.
Replace homepage/storefront URLs with exact product detail pages before image import.
Review prize line rows before provider image runs; wrong source_store sends search to the wrong official provider.
Verify or rename these rows before source/image import; exact official evidence is required.
Regenerate quality, field, image, and review-batch reports before making catalog decisions.
Run sync_catalog_db_active.py and dedupe_catalog_db.py when stale, missing, updated, or duplicate active DB rows appear.
Keep this queue as the requested-list coverage gate before adding duplicate special goods.
Use the focus queue for requested series and collab goods; find exact source pages before attaching images.
Use this narrowed queue for HUNTER, Stellive, Chiikawa MINISO/Gotouchi/Ensky, Bukubu, and Tapinui exact-source review.
